importantNotes.title: Important Notes
importantNotes.note1: • To allow DLL usage, check "Allow DLL imports" in MetaTrader 5 settings.
importantNotes.note3: • If antivirus software blocks the DLL, add an exclusion.

step2.title: Google Form Integration (GAS)
step2.description: Create a new Google Apps Script project and set it up using the provided template.

createProject.title: Create New Project
createProject.step3: Rename the project to 'EA License Application'

prepareCode.title: Prepare Code File
prepareCode.description: Click the button below to download the GAS template file (`gas-template.gs`).

pasteCode.title: Paste Code
pasteCode.description: Open the downloaded `gas-template.gs` file, copy its entire content, and paste it into the Google Apps Script editor, replacing any existing code.

adjustFormFields.title: Adjust FORM_FIELDS
adjustFormFields.description: Adjust the `FORM_FIELDS` object in the script to match your actual Google Form questions. The keys (e.g., `EA_NAME`) are fixed, but the values (e.g., `"Enter your EA name"`) must match your form's question text.
adjustFormFields.exampleDescription: If your form question is "Enter your EA name"

step3.title: Test Integration
step3.description: Run test functions within Google Apps Script to confirm settings and communication.

checkSettings.title: Check Configuration Values
checkSettings.step1: Click 'Run' in the Google Apps Script editor menu.
checkSettings.step2: Hover over 'Run function' and select 'validateConfig' from the dropdown.
checkSettings.step3: After execution, check the 'Execution log' at the bottom of the editor for the message:
checkSettings.onErrorDescription: Re-check the `CONFIG` section values in your script.
